title: Bar Magnet U-Clip Selection Tool
description: An interactive educational tool for Grade 6 Science – Chapter 4: Exploring Magnets. Students identify which option correctly shows how many U-clips stick at positions A (left pole), B (middle), and C (right pole) of a bar magnet.

additionalProps.instructionText: Look at the three positions on the bar magnet. Select the option that correctly shows how many U-clips stick at each position. Remember what you learnt about where iron filings cluster.
additionalProps.correctExplanation: The magnetic pull is strongest at the poles (A and C), so more U-clips stick there and very few in the middle (B).
additionalProps.incorrectHint: Remember where iron filings clustered on the bar magnet. Which parts attract most?

instructions_for_student: Look at the three positions on the bar magnet. Select the option that correctly shows how many U-clips stick at each position. Remember what you learnt about where iron filings cluster.
subject: Science

magnetLabel.description: Label shown in the card header for the magnet type

northLabel.description: Label for the north pole on the magnet diagram

southLabel.description: Label for the south pole on the magnet diagram

instructionText.description: Instruction shown to the student above the options table

options.description: The four multiple-choice options. Each has a label and values for positions A, B, C.

values.A: number – U-clip count at left pole
values.C: number – U-clip count at right pole

correctIndex.description: Zero-based index of the correct option in the options array

correctExplanation.description: One-line explanation shown when student selects the correct answer

incorrectHint.description: Hint shown when student selects an incorrect answer

themeColor.description: Primary accent/highlight color (hex). Affects button, badge, and highlight colors.

darkMode.description: Enable dark theme for night-time or low-light environments

width.description: Max width of the card in pixels

_agent_examples.description: Dark mode variant for projector/classroom use

call.title: Bar Magnet U-Clip Selection Tool – Dark

additionalProps.correctExplanation: Excellent! Magnetic poles attract the most – that is why U-clips cluster at A and C.
additionalProps.incorrectHint: Think: where do iron filings bunch up on a bar magnet?

_agent_examples.description: Custom options for a horseshoe/U-shaped magnet quiz

additionalProps.instructionText: A U-shaped magnet has both poles at the open ends. Which option shows the correct U-clip distribution?
additionalProps.correctExplanation: Both ends of a U-shaped magnet are poles, so U-clips cluster at both A and C.
additionalProps.incorrectHint: Both open ends of a U-magnet are poles. Where would clips be attracted most?

_decision_tree.description: When to use this tool vs others
use_this_tool_when: Student asks about magnetic pole strength / iron filings distribution
Activity involves choosing correct U-clip / iron filing counts
MCQ-style question about bar magnet properties
Atharv's U-clip experiment from NCERT Chapter 4
do_not_use_when: Question is about compass direction (use compass direction tool)
Question is about magnetic vs non-magnetic materials sorting
